{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323052145F9E18B48710709F66D9D"}"},"total":3344},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7189832124735406908","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书还挺好看的，男主是团宠，他养的小动物宠着他，他认识的朋友也宠着他，真的件事很不错，比较温馨吧，好看(*๓´╰╯`๓)♡"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1674013371,"group_id":"7155686985909144614","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"陪我一起安睡到天明","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxC7yDNQh7EWc27/wCgK0kQ=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8603af4ea1bf41dcb04d7d18511704a9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788726&x-signature=w%2BTam6fE4b8AQM80GK3eJetRv9s%3D","user_id":"52383140021719","user_name":"一起安睡到天明"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"52383140021719","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1703845826,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7155686985909144614","book_info":{"abstract":"【求生游戏】【种田】【日常文】【宠物】【萌宠】【无cp】【无女主】【基建】
穿越到全民求生存的异世界，叶飞有点慌。
直到他捡了一只小白团子。
小狐狸，小猫咪，小彩鹿，小狗崽，小鸡仔，小...
捡到各种可可爱爱的小动物养着，在别人还努力求生存的时候，他年纪轻轻就已经开始安心养老了。
至于他们都说，自家养的是凶兽...
这种话怎么能乱说呢？
它们那么乖，一定是你们先惹它们的...","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6914b295c3d1b0b24c5f32e0a8b79d18","author":"飞雪喵","author_id":"","book_id":"7155686985909144614","book_name":"求生游戏：我家宠物真的是萌系","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":74,"name":"宠物","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74&name=宠物&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7155688049618190863","read_count":"23370","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1515084"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"746","tags":"游戏体育,穿越,宠物,求生,无女主,基建,无CP","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oc0955dda6445be72b05e1a3631410cf9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779398505&x-signature=RaAZjDEPt3snvBu6teCNhOwFf0k%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"817640699340061","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.13998e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323052145F9E18B48710709F66D9D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":40,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":5373,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10512,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":26518},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7169753931160519431","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这求生文里的清流啊，看文时内心都变得温柔三分。主角清冷又温柔，他被社会教会了自私却又不缺生而为人的善良。
主角不是所有人中最厉害的，但是一定是最会养崽儿的（或者崽儿们养主角hh），日常养成系，喜欢快节奏的不要看了。
宠物是伙伴，是陪伴，二者相处，它们像是主角的孩子一样，会因为它们能力变强骄傲欣喜，也会因为它们辛苦狩猎而心疼。
目前来看，不是后宫预备役！！！一群可爱又懂事的崽儿们，不是她，只是它。
对我来说最最最爱的一点是，这个作者给宠物取名字超好听！！！不是其他文里的小黑小白小红，我夸爆！
我只求不烂尾，写完结，作者爱什么时候更，爱写多少字，喵喵你随意o(╥﹏╥)o"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1669338518,"group_id":"7155686985909144614","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"东北夹zhi，爱囤男女频书但不咋看，我不是哑巴也不是你的新娘","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+5tI1OYprzj4nbvrMqP+Jn0PVcOcQNYg5fUF5MVZ0dL","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0f99b93f09e14eeaaba97eb673188119~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796901&x-signature=gfG7KXYn2hTgVFBEWCUrW4OX9OA%3D","user_id":"3148597428752600","user_name":"梓榠一休养版"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3148597428752600","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7155686985909144614","book_info":{"abstract":"【求生游戏】【种田】【日常文】【宠物】【萌宠】【无cp】【无女主】【基建】
